message:
test(core): add FleetScrollbackCoordinator stress tests for swarm scenarios

Adds 3 coordinator stress tests to e2e_swarm_stress_core.rs:
- coordinator_emergency_at_200_panes: validates emergency eviction clears
  all warm data across 200 panes with 5000 lines each, verifying data
  integrity and memory reduction below 200 MB
- coordinator_multi_tick_escalation_scenario: simulates Normal→Elevated→
  Critical pressure escalation over 3 ticks on 100 panes, verifying
  warm bytes decrease and telemetry tracks progression
- coordinator_recovery_after_pressure_subsides: validates eviction stops
  when pressure returns to Normal after a critical event

All 29 stress tests passing (26 existing + 3 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
